architecture.title: Architecture Design
architecture.subtitle: Carbon-Smart, Timeless Architectural Environments
architecture.description: We craft architectural wonders that harmonize structural integrity with human comfort. Our designs are carbon-smart, fully compliant with international building codes, and simulated virtually prior to breaking ground.

subServices.name: Residential Architecture
subServices.description: High-end bespoke villas, premium multi-family complexes, and sustainable masterplanned estates.
features: Bespoke architectural layout tailored to local microclimates
Passive heating/cooling integration for energy cost reduction
Ultra-realistic 3D walkthroughs and material specifications

subServices.name: Commercial Architecture
subServices.description: State-of-the-art office headquarters, lifestyle retail hubs, and mixed-use high-rise towers.
features: Flexible floor plate design to accommodate changing lease layouts
Acoustic, fire, and structural hazard simulation integration
High-traffic circulation planning and glass facade optimization

subServices.name: Infrastructure Design
subServices.description: Mass transit stations, municipal centers, utility architecture, and smart-city landscape integration.
features: Heavy-duty civil structural engineering coordination
Public safety and crowd circulation computational simulations
Carbon-neutral, resilient, and climate-adaptive materials

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.subtitle: Ergonomic Luxury & Human-Centric Spaces
interior.description: Our interior design division marries aesthetic elegance with deep space-planning ergonomics. We deliver curated spatial identities that increase wellness, collaboration, and spatial efficiency.

subServices.name: Residential Interiors
subServices.description: High-end luxury apartments, personalized penthouses, and bespoke custom furniture curation.
features: Custom millwork and acoustic insulation design
Curated lighting choreography using circadian-rhythm LED technologies
Premium, non-toxic, sustainable material palettes

subServices.name: Office Space Interiors
subServices.description: Acoustically sound collaborative zones, productive workspaces, and modular focus areas.
features: Biophilic air-filtration plants and natural light mapping
Modular partitioning for rapid workspace re-configurations
Integrated cable management and under-floor service pathways

subServices.name: Commercial Interiors
subServices.description: Hospitality lobbies, retail experiences, dining spaces, and customer showrooms.
features: Aesthetic sensory branding and customer journey layout flow
Heavy-traffic commercial grade flooring and textile durability
Integrated audio-visual and experiential sensory zones

bim.title: BIM Engineering Services
bim.subtitle: High-Fidelity Virtual Construction Modeling
bim.description: The operational core of BIM Earth. We translate 2D conceptual designs into unified, clash-free, intelligent 3D BIM models up to LOD 500 (Level of Development) for complete asset lifecycle management.

subServices.name: Architecture BIM
subServices.description: Detailed parametric modeling of building envelopes, interior partitions, and high-performance material scheduling.
features: Intelligent Revit family creation and architectural schedule mapping
Exact quantities and material take-offs (QTO) generated from the model
LOD 100 to LOD 500 complete architectural modeling transition

subServices.name: Structural BIM
subServices.description: Parametric detailing of structural concrete, steel framing, rebar placements, and foundation geometries.
features: Deep steel connection modeling and reinforcement scheduling
Analytical model linking for FEA structural structural testing
Precast and post-tension concrete element virtual scheduling

subServices.name: MEP BIM
subServices.description: Clash-resolved coordination of HVAC ducts, electrical conduits, plumbing networks, and fire safety systems.
features: Advanced multi-trade clash detection and automated resolution workflow
Spatial routing optimization for maximum ceiling heights
Pre-fabrication drawings and laser-scanning point cloud registration
